overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a mountain trail at night. The character explores a grassy hillside path with atmospheric fog, passing stone ruins and approaching a mysterious ghostly figure in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain trail with panoramic valley views

events.description: character turns left to look at the valley view while continuing to walk along the path

agents.ego_description: walking along the hillside trail and turning to survey the landscape and distant mountains

entered.detail: narrow winding dirt trail through grassy terrain
steep grass-covered slope rising beside the path
dark silhouetted mountain range visible against night sky
sparse trees dotting the landscape in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide mountain trail at night with panoramic views of distant mountains. The character walks along a dirt path bordered by grassy hillsides, occasionally turning to look at the valley scenery. The atmosphere is calm and exploratory with clear night visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain path alongside ancient stone ruins

events.description: thick atmospheric mist rolls in around the stone ruins reducing visibility

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the path beside ancient stone wall ruins

entered.detail: ancient weathered stone wall running alongside the path
low-lying fog gathering around the ruins and path

segments.scene_description: The path narrows as ancient stone ruins appear on the right side. Atmospheric mist begins to gather around the weathered stone walls, creating a moody, mysterious ambiance. The character continues walking forward as the environment becomes more enclosed.

events.description: ghostly white figure becomes visible standing motionless in the path ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through dense forest toward a ghostly figure standing on the path ahead

notable_agents.action: ghostly figure in white standing motionless on the path facing the character

entered.detail: thick trees lining both sides of the narrow forest path
translucent white humanoid figure standing on the path

segments.scene_description: The trail enters a densely forested area with trees blocking much of the night sky. As the character progresses, a ghostly white figure becomes visible standing motionless in the path ahead, creating a supernatural encounter atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey along a mountain trail that transforms from an open, panoramic vista into a claustrophobic supernatural encounter. It begins on a wide dirt path bordered by grassy hillsides, where the camera captures expansive views of distant mountains under a clear night sky. As the character progresses, the path narrows and the environment becomes more enclosed, with weathered stone ruins appearing on the right as a moody mist begins to gather around the walls. The scene then shifts into a densely forested area where towering trees block the sky, deepening the sense of isolation. Finally, the trail opens slightly to reveal a ghostly white figure standing motionless in the path ahead, shifting the atmosphere from calm exploration to supernatural tension.
